title: sambucus × strumpfii
intro: Sambucus × strumpfii, also known as the hybrid elder or elderberry elder, is a cross between Sambucus nigra and Sambucus caerulea, two species of flowering plants in the family Adoxaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sambucus × strumpfii include relief from cold and flu symptoms, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup, with the flowers, leaves, and berries being used in herbal preparations.
